privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic Java refactoring exercise using Eclipse IDE with Java 17. The ServiceApp project is created at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/ServiceApp with three key classes: User (model), UserService (service with 5 public methods: findById, findAll, save, delete, exists), and UserController (controller depending on UserService). The goal is to extract an interface named IUserService in package com.serviceapp.service and update UserController to depend on the interface. Eclipse is located at /opt/eclipse/eclipse with JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64. The verifier checks: (1) IUserService exists as valid interface (20 pts), (2) all 5 required methods are in interface (20 pts), (3) UserService implements IUserService (20 pts), (4) UserController uses IUserService (20 pts), (5) project compiles (10 pts), (6) VLM trajectory verification (10 pts). Pass threshold is 70 points AND compilation success.
